content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -1.04%, Bank Nifty -1.03%, VIX +8.55% to 18.28 — clear risk-off tape. However, Pharma, Healthcare, FMCG showing relative strength (defensive rotation). Existing book is well-diversified across defensives which is appropriate given the tape. Late session (14:40) — limited time for new entries and macro events tomorrow.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24100
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 121.00,
      "new_target": 135.00,
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "GOLDBEES at -1.3%, CMP 123.51 sits 2% above SL 121. Gold structurally supported by VIX spike, Fed rate-cut cycle, CB demand. SL placement still appropriate — no-op MODIFY avoided; HOLD is the right call. Correcting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Hedge against risk-off. SL 121 is 2% below CMP — appropriate gap. No change needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 838.00,
      "new_target": 870.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "MARICO +3.3% at 846.90, near 52w-high 843.15 — broken out. Current SL 838 is already locked at +2.2% above entry (good). CMP 846.90, SL 838 = 1.04% gap — meets 1% trail-gap floor. Q4 strong (PAT +18%, India volume +9%), MOFSL TP 950. Hold target 870; if it breaks, will trail higher next tick. No-op MODIFY — converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SL already at 838 (+2.2% above entry), CMP 846.90, gap 1.04% — at floor. Original target 870 still ~2.7% upside. No change needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1365.00,
      "new_target": 1500.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "COFORGE +9.7% at 1380, gapped massively post-Q4 results (PAT +91% FY26, $1.75B order book, FY27 EBITDA guide >20.5%). Current SL 1365 is at +8.4% above entry locking in solid gain. CMP 1380, SL 1365 gap = 1.09% — at floor. Confirming current levels; no-op MODIFY — converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SL 1365 locks in +8.4% gain with 1.09% gap to CMP — at floor for trail discipline. Target 1500 (+8.6% upside) still in play given fresh Q4 momentum. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SRF +1.2% at 2817, P&L barely positive. SL 2740 (-1.6% from CMP) provides standard cushion. Bullish chemicals fundamentals (Q3 PAT +60%, 15-20% chemicals growth guide). Not yet at +2% trigger to trail to breakeven. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "POLYCAB +0.1% at 9096, near 52w-high. SL 8950 (-1.6%) appropriate cushion. FY26 PAT +32%, market leader. P&L not at +2% trail trigger yet. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "BAJAJ-AUTO -1.4% at 10602, SL 10440 (-1.5% from CMP). Q4 PAT +103% (incl one-time), Rs 12000 buyback at +13% above CMP acts as price floor. Buyback record date May 29 is bullish catalyst, not binary risk. Hold to SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "DABUR -1.6% at 479, SL 470 (-1.9% from CMP). Q4 strong (PAT +15.75%, India FMCG +9.5%, raised FY27 guide to low double-digit). Thesis intact, SL absorbs normal noise. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1255.00,
      "new_target": 1320.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "LAURUSLABS +3.9% at 1274.80. Current SL 1255 already locks in +2.4% gain. CMP 1274.80, SL 1255 = 1.55% gap — above floor. Kotak Sell-rated with TP 800 is a concern; sitting at ATH. SL placement appropriate. No-op MODIFY — converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SL 1255 locks +2.4% gain. CMP 1274.80, 1.55% gap. At ATH after strong Q4 CDMO print but Kotak Sell creates two-sided risk. Hold current levels."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "TATACONSUM +1.4% at 1261. Today +9.55% post-Q4 (UVG +16%, broker upgrades). SL 1198 (-5% from CMP) — wide. Not yet at +2% trail trigger. Hold. NOTE: OPEN BUY 20 @ 1240 still working — leaving in place as backup add if pullback."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CGPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CGPOWER -0.5% at 861. SL 850 (-1.3% from CMP). Q4 in-line, order book +61% YoY, ATH made May 8. Thesis intact, normal pullback. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "APOLLOHOSP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "APOLLOHOSP flat at 8092, near 52w-high. SL 7950 (-1.8% from CMP). Board meeting May 20 for Q4 results — within ~5 trading sessions but not yet 3. HSBC TP 9000. Hold; will reassess for binary discipline in 2 sessions."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SUNPHARMA flat at 1872, near ATH. SL 1830 (-2.3%). Q4 earnings May 21 — over 3 sessions out, no binary trigger yet. Pharma defensive bid intact. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "LALPATHLAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "LALPATHLAB -1.0% at 1648. SL 1610 (-2.3%). Research is BEARISH (-0.10 modifier, Tata 1mg disruption, margin compression, ICICI cut TP to 1460). Thesis weakening but no fresh breakdown today. Hold to SL — let SL discipline manage exit per Rule 17."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TORNTPHARM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "TORNTPHARM flat at 4534, just made new 52w-high today (4555). SL 4360 (-3.8% from CMP) — wide. Q4 results May 21. JB Chemicals merger advancing. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Pending OPEN BUY 20 @ 1240 (449m old, placed pre-Q4 print). Stock has run away to 1261; LIMIT 1240 unlikely to fill today but is a reasonable pullback entry. Not stacking another. Leaving as-is — if it fills on pullback, adds to position at favorable price; if not, expires."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {"symbol": "GOLDBEES", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Hedge intact, SL appropriate."},
    {"symbol": "MARICO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL already trailed to +2.2% above entry, 1% gap to CMP — at floor."},
    {"symbol": "COFORGE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 1365 locks +8.4% gain, 1.09% gap to CMP — at floor."},
    {"symbol": "SRF", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Below trail trigger, SL absorbs noise."},
    {"symbol": "POLYCAB", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "P&L flat, SL appropriate."},
    {"symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Buyback floor at 12000, hold to SL."},

    {"symbol": "LAURUSLABS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL locks +2.4%, 1.55% gap to CMP."},
    {"symbol": "TATACONSUM", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Wide SL on day-of-result move, not at trail trigger."},
    {"symbol": "CGPOWER", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL placement appropriate."},

    {"symbol": "SUNPHARMA", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Q4 May 21 — over 3 sessions, no binary trigger."},
    {"symbol": "LALPATHLAB", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Bearish research but no fresh breakdown; hold to SL."},
    {"symbol": "TORNTPHARM", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "At 52w-high, Q4 May 21 — reassess in 2 sessions for binary cap."}
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "TATACONSUM OPEN order at 1240 leaves passive add option on pullback. THERMAX/MCX/BHARATFORG/PERSISTENT/ASIANPAINT — no data provided in this batch; no actionable read. KOTAKBANK research BEARISH (-0.12), 1Y -13.2%, PE 28x — skip as new entry. HCLTECH/INFY/NIFTYBEES/UPL/BIOCON/HCLTECH — no data this batch. Deployment 55% with cash 45% — soft target 80%. With VIX +8.55%, Nifty -1%, 49 minutes to close, late-session entries into a risk-off tape with new MIS cutoff approaching (2:30 IST passed) is not the right risk-adjusted call. The 14 existing CNC names already span FMCG/Pharma/Healthcare/Cap Goods/Chemicals/Banking/IT/Auto/Gold — book is structurally appropriate for current tape. Specifically rejecting new BUYs this tick because: (1) VIX +8.55% session, broad indices -1%+ — fresh entries should wait for stabilization or specific catalyst-driven pullbacks; (2) several pharma names in book (TORNTPHARM, SUNPHARMA, APOLLOHOSP) have Q4 binaries in 5-7 sessions — adding more pharma stacks calendar risk; (3) defensive rotation candidates today (LAURUSLABS, TORNTPHARM, LALPATHLAB) already in book.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Today realized -INR 28,429 + unrealized +5,387 = -2.36% day. Cumulative -2.49%. The 5-day stats show concerning profit factor 0.3x with avg loss 2.4x avg win — exits have been too quick on winners and too late on losers. Today's MODIFY discipline (avoiding no-op MODIFYs by reading current SL state) is the right correction. Book sized appropriately at 55% deployed with 45% cash for risk-off tape with VIX 18.28. Will reassess admit-side tomorrow with overnight global cues."
}
